violations.text: A couple hand-washing sinks in the kitchen/service areas were lacking proper hand-washing signage. New Violation. Correct By: 08/12/2025

Yogurt parfait packaged in the food establishment are lacking complete labels (incomplete list of ingredients and lack listed allergens). Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name and address. New Violation. Correct By: 08/12/2025
Inspector observed several items at the hot and cold self-service areas lacking signage with ingredients and allergens. New Violation. Correct By: 08/12/2025

The bay door to the outside, located in the loading dock area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 08/26/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the kitchen area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 08/19/2025

A carafe of milk was observed held at 48 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/06/2024
Nonfood contact surfaces of the slicer were observed with an accumulation of food debris. New Violation. Correct By: 06/06/2024
